song.title: At the Cross
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Alas, and did my Savior bleed? And did my Sov’reign die? Would He devote that sacred head For such a worm as I?
[C] Chorus At the cross, At the cross where I first saw the light, And the burden of my heart rolled away It was there by faith I received my sight, And now I am happy all the day!
[V2] 2) Was it for sins that I had done He groaned upon the tree? Amazing pity! grace unknown! And love beyond degree!
[V3] 3) Well might the sun in darkness hide, And shut His glories in, When Christ, the mighty Maker, died For man His creature’s sin.
[V4] 4) Thus might I hide my blushing face While His dear cross appears, Dissolve my heart in thankfulness, And melt mine eyes to tears.
[V5] 5) But drops of grief can ne’er repay The debt of love I owe; Here, Lord, I give myself away, ’Tis all that I can do.
song.author: Isaac Watts
